summary:
Paucigranulocytic asthmatics are not genuinely non-inflamed; they exhibit detectable systemic inflammation through elevated eosinophils, IgE levels, and active cytokine profiles. The efficacy of anti-type 2 therapy confirms this underlying immunological activity despite absent sputum granulocytes. 

The summary must be strictly factual based only on what was stated by Agent1 — no external knowledge or assumptions allowed.
